description_long: This kiosk is a retail display stand designed for showcasing and dispensing boxed products, specifically a 6.5ft LED color changing tape light kit by Brightlux. The structure is tall and rectangular, with a black base and a prominent blue horizontal band around the middle. The front and sides feature printed signage with product images, branding, and descriptive text, while the top section includes a vertical header sign for increased visibility. The kiosk is open at the top, with multiple product slots or compartments visible, allowing easy access for customers to pick up individual items. The overall construction appears to be made of sturdy cardboard or laminated board, suitable for temporary placement in high-traffic urban retail environments.
description: A tall, rectangular retail display kiosk for LED tape light kits, featuring printed signage, product slots, and a prominent header sign.
description_view_0: Side view showing the printed product signage, colorful LED tape light imagery, and the open product slots at the top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the main header sign with product branding and price, as well as multiple boxed products arranged in rows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, with clear visibility of the product signage and open slots.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain black and blue panel with no signage or product access.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and product branding; header sign above product slots, printed panels on front and sides with product images and text (e.g., '6.5ft LED Color Changing Tape Light Kit', 'Brightlux').
attribute_roof_design: Flat top, open with vertical header sign; constructed from the same laminated board as the rest of the kiosk.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern retail display with minimalist, functional design and bold branding.
